candidates.title: Announcing OpenAI-compatible API support for Amazon SageMaker AI endpoints
candidates.summary: Today, Amazon SageMaker AI introduces OpenAI-compatible API support for real-time inference endpoints. If you use the OpenAI SDK, LangChain, or Strands Agents, you can now invoke models on SageMaker AI by changing only your endpoint URL. You don’t need a custom client, a SigV4 wrapper, or code rewrites. Overview With this launch, SageMaker AI endpoints […]

candidates.title: AdventHealth advances whole-person care with OpenAI
candidates.summary: AdventHealth is using ChatGPT for Healthcare to streamline workflows, reduce administrative burden, and return more time to patient care.

candidates.title: Build real-time voice applications with Amazon SageMaker AI and vLLM
candidates.summary: Voice agents, live captioning, contact center analytics, and accessibility tools all depend on real-time speech-to-text, where your application streams audio in and receives transcription back simultaneously over a single persistent connection. Traditional request-response inference falls short here because transcription cannot begin until the entire audio recording has been received, adding latency that breaks the real-time […]

candidates.title: Spotify launches an ElevenLabs-powered audiobook creation tool
candidates.summary: The AI-powered audiobook generation won't bind authors to an exclusive contract, meaning they are free to publish their generated audiobooks anywhere.

candidates.title: Hark raises $700M Series A for its secretive ‘universal’ AI interface
candidates.summary: Hark expects to release its first multimodal models this summer, which it says will power a personal AI platform that works with existing products and services. The company expects to follow that with hardware devices built specifically for those systems.

candidates.title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
candidates.summary: This year at Google I/O 2026, we announced Gemini Omni, Google Antigravity, Universal Cart and so much more. Here are the highlights.

candidates.title: We’re announcing new community investments in Missouri.
candidates.summary: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
